name: Heath
description:
Situated close to Uttoxeter town centre, The Heath is a mainly residential area and home to many growing families.

Children attend Tynsell Parks Primary School and can enjoy their leisure time at Heath Community Centre, which provides a base for clubs, activities and meetings.

The area also includes Uttoxeter’s main recreational area, Bramshall Park. The area is also home to the world famous JCB World Parts factory fringing the main A50 - a main employer for the town and surrounding area.
